Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter

  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Curses-Application/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-Curses-Application/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Curses-Application/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:42:27 2014	(r355237)
+++ head/devel/p5-Curses-Application/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:42:32 2014	(r355238)
@@ -8,9 +8,11 @@ MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 DISTNAME=	CursesApplication-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Curses application development framework
 
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Curses-Forms>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Curses-Forms
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
